name: Sloppy Joes
recipeInstructions:
Serves 8 to 10
In a large skillet, brown ground beef, onion, and garlic. Cook until meat is brown and onion is tender. Drain off fat.
Combine ketchup, green sweet pepper, water, prepared mustard, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, and chili powder in any size Crock-Pot. Stir in meat mixture. Cover and cook on LOW for 6 to 8 hours or HIGH for 3 to 4 hours. Spoon into hamburger buns.
Variation: Substitute ground turkey, chicken, or pork in place of the ground beef.
